responseMessageContents.title: Removed the loading screen from the chat room to make it open instantly.
responseMessageContents.description: The wait screen that used to show up when opening the chat room has been removed. Now, the chat area appears immediately so you can start using it right away. We have also verified that this change works correctly on all devices.
